heading: Action of the Governors
label: 3632 Action of the Governors
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (c), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 109–435Dec. 20, 2006

children.heading: .—Authority To Establish Rates and Classes
children.label: a .—Authority To Establish Rates and Classes
children.text: The Governors, with the concurrence of a majority of all of the Governors then holding office, shall establish rates and classes for products in the competitive category of mail in accordance with the requirements of this subchapter and regulations promulgated under section 3633.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Rates and classes shall be established in writing, complete with a statement of explanation and justification, and the date as of which each such rate or class takes effect.

children.heading: .—Rates or classes of general applicability
children.label: 2 .—Rates or classes of general applicability
children.text: In the case of rates or classes of general applicability in the Nation as a whole or in any substantial region of the Nation, the Governors shall cause each rate and class decision under this section and the record of the Governors’ proceedings in connection with such decision to be published in the Federal Register at least 30 days before the effective date of any new rates or classes.

children.heading: .—Rates or classes not of general applicability
children.label: 3 .—Rates or classes not of general applicability
children.text: In the case of rates or classes not of general applicability in the Nation as a whole or in any substantial region of the Nation, the Governors shall cause each rate and class decision under this section and the record of the proceedings in connection with such decision to be filed with the Postal Regulatory Commission by such date before the effective date of any new rates or classes as the Governors consider appropriate, but in no case less than 15 days.

children.heading: .—Criteria
children.label: 4 .—Criteria
children.text: As part of the regulations required under section 3633, the Postal Regulatory Commission shall establish criteria for determining when a rate or class established under this subchapter is or is not of general applicability in the Nation as a whole or in any substantial region of the Nation.

children.heading: .—Transition Rule
children.label: c .—Transition Rule
children.text: Until regulations under section 3633 first take effect, rates and classes for competitive products shall remain subject to modification in accordance with the provisions of this chapter and section 407, as such provisions were as last in effect before the date of enactment of this section.
